Dark Ember  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +2 WIS: +5 HP: +20 MANA: +20
SV FIRE: +7
Effect: Burn (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR PAL SHD DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +7
Effect: Burn (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR PAL SHD DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Smithing Hammer of Firbrand the Black
Item Type:1H Blunt
Light:Tiny Glowing Skull
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:23 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:539
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 10:34:17
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 700pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 37

QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2004 at 7:59 PM Rating: Decent

17 posts
i am a 32 bst that said i whould help some frends to git dark ember if i am 32 and a 34cliric and a 30 druid can we kill him?
▲ Page top
Cost Ha Ha
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2003 at 3:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761034430
19 posts
I have a level 40 Dru on Tunare, and I got this for him at level 35 in the bazaar for 100pp. Looking at the rest of these posts, I got a hell of a deal. Just goes to show what a little patience can do for you when buying something.
I will admit that it took me two days of shopping before I got the price I wanted, But it was worth the wait! As a Druid, I don't hit too well in melee fights, but I find this to be an Excellent item to have for those difficult times just before I ding to a new spell level. The old spells are not always enough to do the job, But this has saved my bacon more than once.
▲ Page top

# Feb 15 2003 at 3:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595175363720
50 posts

Thanks

QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362346838
55 posts
depends what class you are. but youd be safe with a group of 3 due to erratic spawn adds that occasionally occur.

# Apr 14 2003 at 7:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767777428
41 posts
You must have went during a ring war or something. Firbrand the Black spawns about 1 out of every 10 blacksmith and 1 out of every 10 times he has this. During ring war he is always up and always has this!

▲ Page top
Worst day ever
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778464530
24 posts
In my year of EQ life, today was the wrost day ever. I got two dark embers stolen from me, for those of you keeping score at home thats 3kpp gone in one day.

The frist was to someone i was PLing. He was using a Veilum Warhammer so i lent him my Dark Ember while i was PLing him. Halfway through he asked to trade hammers, i resisting laughing and said id rather keep mine. Anyway druing a short med break, he loged with my hammer.

After that i went back to Eastern Wastes to get a new one. Anyway after waiting four hours for FirBrand to pop, i get ready to cast harmony, and BAM KSed.

The moral of this story is not to trust newbies and make sure you annoce when your camping something

Oh btw, died three times that day

Edited, Sun Jun 30 19:08:50 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Worst day ever
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259033734
3 posts
i did something like that before i had 1 weapon on my char and in bank i let a newbie use it he went ld and never said anyting i when through 3HOURS before i asked a good friend of mine to get me 800PP to get a dark ember
▲ Page top
RE: Worst day ever
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2002 at 2:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758636154
17 posts
Way to go there STUPID ! How about letting me hold all of you plat you have in the bank while you switch chars ....*snikers* Anyone who has played EQ (even newbies) know Trust must be earned NEVER let someone hold something you cant aford to loose and you ALWAYS announce your camps...and BTW ksing is only considered once a target HAS been enguaged NOT almost or about to ....So sorry about your bad luck....PS I will sell you my Dark Ember I got right before this guy thought he was going to drop him. Man he was mad too , said something about casting harmony and I was a kill stealer.

RE: Worst day ever

__DEL__1591778323867

24 posts

# Aug 12 2002 at 2:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765969734

87 posts
Ummm and the lesson we've learned today is...

NEVER, EVER LOAN AN ITEM UNLESS YOU KNOW THE RL PERSON CONTROLLING HIM/HER!

I feel bad for you, but it's common sense dude...
▲ Page top
RE: Worst day ever
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 1:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
I have about 10kpp worth of gear and cash loaned out ot members of my guild, none of whom I know in RL. But I've known them a long time in game, and trust them.

But never loan something you can't afford to lose, especially to someone you don't know well.

BTW, a centi warhammer would have been better for PLing, and cheaper too.
▲ Page top
RE: Worst day ever
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 11:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570554536
66 posts
I think, perhaps, you are a little too trusting?
▲ Page top
Battle Cleric
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 5:02 AM Rating: Decent
Debalic
Prodigal Son
20,643 posts
After spending some time wearing a dress and playing with dolls, I decided to drop the wussy image and start getting fierce. Got a Netherbian Chitin to swap out with my Crystal Covered Shroud (stats are worse except for the AC, and fire resist) got me a Charred Guardian shield and this baby.
WOW!
I'd been working up my melee skills with a Velium Etched mace then switched to this. Granted it's a bit slow, but I'm hitting for 25-30 a pop and with haste buffs, I'm almost doing viable melee damage. It procs like mad which is a nice little bonus. The stats kick *** and overall I'm VERY happy with this (I paid 500pp for the DE and a Goblin Soulcaller neckpiece to a guildie)
____________________________
publiusvarus wrote:
we all know liberals are well adjusted american citizens who only want what's best for society. While conservatives are evil money grubbing scum who only want to sh*t on the little man and rob the world of its resources.
▲ Page top
RE: Battle Cleric
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2002 at 10:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247835252
4 posts
Ok bro no offence i know your a cleric, 25-30 ain't viable melee damage at 52, my 15th lvl ogre war hits for 30-34, albiet with 215str and a centi, but at 52 i hope your healing more then hitting.


Cankker
15th lvl warrior
Thouluxe Paells

Edited, Mon Sep 30 23:31:13 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 23 2002 at 2:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ill buy one of these im in nro send tell if anyone wants to sell to a newbe pally lvl 10
RE: ill buy one
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2002 at 8:16 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Hey, great. I'll go look for you. Oh wait, maybe you're on a different server. Also, you probably won't be on at the same time. Hopefully, you are able to sense my sarcasm. You will be very unlikely to get one of these by posting this here. A better idea would be to add one to your want to buy wishlist. Even better would be to go to your server's auction zone, or use the auction channel, and buy one online. Although, how a lvl 10 has 1000pp to spend on a weapon, I don't know. Furthermore, if you have 1kpp to spend, buy a good slashing weapon. centi shortsword will outdamage this, and is about 400pp. for 2 handed, you can pick up a mithril 2hander for about 500pp, and that will also outdamage this.

Leave these to the poor clerics and druids, who can't use the good slashing weapons.
▲ Page top
Great item
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2002 at 8:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250486659
23 posts
Personally, I think this is a great weapon for me. I'm a 39 Druid, just bought it for 1k. When I solo I use it along with my ToV. When I'm in a group I use my Paw of Opolla and my ToV. I think the difference between WIS is not all that a big deal, especially when I can melee :).
And as far as a Duid not using a weapon after 34 (or whatever lvl) that's purely a Druid's OWN choice. If a Druid is worth anything he/she will already have done thier part (DS/snare/dot/DD) in the group BEFORE they begin to melee.
▲ Page top
RE: Great item
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2003 at 10:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784812120
78 posts
Personally I think you need more wis. Youre not going to be hitting those higher lvl mobs. I likt it and all for now hoping to get Sheild of Bane Warding soon and paw of opolla. Thats 29 wis bud, Youre choice on DE and ToV.. but its alot less wis
▲ Page top
RE: Great item
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 12:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594573349390
Scholar
44 posts
I agree, as far as any character, caster or no, is concerned you need a weapon of some kind. So why not make it one as nice as this so that you can survive when you are out of mana. Just my 2cp.
